ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address for mailings */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number for international travel */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the passenger record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the passenger record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers that can be accommodated in the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided in the class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the class was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_travel_classes" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the travel class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the gender record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the gender record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_sex" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the gender */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embarkation_points" (
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embarkation point */,
  "embarkation_name" TEXT /* Name of the embarkation point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the embarkation point */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the embarkation point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the embarkation point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the embarkation point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the embarkation point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_embarkation" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the embarkation point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "embarkation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the passenger */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the travel route */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the travel class */,
  "embarkation_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the embarkation point */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of departure */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of arrival */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in hours */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trip (e.g., Planned, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trip record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trip record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES travel_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_embarkation_id FOREIGN KEY ("embarkation_id") REFERENCES embarkation_points ("embarkation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel route */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the route */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare for the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trip */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID for the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  "points_required" INTEGER /* Points required to join the program */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* List of benefits provided by the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_loyalty" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the passenger */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trip */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the passenger */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the passenger */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Whether the passenger would recommend the trip */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety report */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trip */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., 1 for minor, 5 for major) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the incident has been resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_reports_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
